Bash(sqlite3 salon-erp.db "SELECT id, nome, subcategoria, classificacao FROM tipo_despesa WHERE subcategoria = 'Açúcar' OR nome LIKE '%Açúcar%';")
Bash(awk '/v-show="activeView === .cmv-inteligente/{flag=1; line=NR} flag && /<\\/div>/{count++; if\(count==2\){print NR": "$0; exit}}' salon-erp/frontend/index.html)
Bash(sqlite3 salon-erp.db "UPDATE faturamento SET categoria = 'Keeta' WHERE categoria = 'Keepa'; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as 'registros atualizados' FROM faturamento WHERE categoria = 'Keeta';")
Bash(sqlite3 salon-erp.db "UPDATE faturamento SET categoria = 'Keeta' WHERE categoria = 'Keepa';")
Bash(sqlite3 salon-erp.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM faturamento WHERE categoria = 'Keeta';")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) despesas = [f for f in data.get\('data', []\) if f['tipo'] == 'despesa' and '2026-04' in f['data']] print\(f'Total despesas no período: {len\(despesas\)}'\) print\(\) por_categoria = {} for d in despesas: cat = d['categoria'] por_categoria[cat] = por_categoria.get\(cat, 0\) + d['total'] for cat, total in sorted\(por_categoria.items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True\): print\(f'{cat}: R\\$ {total:,.2f}'\) print\(\) print\(f'TOTAL: R\\$ {sum\(por_categoria.values\(\)\):,.2f}'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('totalTaxasReais:', data['data']['resumo'].get\('totalTaxasReais', 'NOT FOUND'\)\)")
Bash(sqlite3 salon-erp.db "SELECT id, data, total, categoria, tipo FROM faturamento ORDER BY data DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('✅ SUCCESS!' if d.get\('success'\) else '❌ FAIL'\); print\('Dias:', d['data'].get\('resumo', d['data']\).get\('dias', d['data'].get\('periodo', {}\).get\('dias', 'NOT FOUND'\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if data.get\('success'\): entries = [e for e in data['data'] if e['data'] == '2026-04-28'] print\(f'✅ Encontrado {len\(entries\)} lançamentos em 28/04:'\) for e in entries: print\(f\\" ID {e['id']}: {e['categoria']:12} | {e['tipo']:7} | R\\$ {e['total']:10.2f}\\"\) else: print\('❌ Erro ao carregar dados'\) ")
Bash(sqlite3 "C:\\Users\\adm\\Desktop\\Claude\\salon-erp\\backend\\salon-erp.db" "SELECT DISTINCT categoria, COUNT\(*\) as total FROM faturamento GROUP BY categoria ORDER BY total DESC;")

Bash(sqlite3 backend/salon-erp.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(tipo_despesa_id\) as com_tipo_despesa, SUM\(CASE WHEN tipo_despesa_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as sem_tipo_despesa FROM faturamento;")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; 'Processos eliminados'")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0, 'utf-8'\); const json = JSON.parse\(data\); console.log\('\\n╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗'\); console.log\('║              API RESPONSE - CMV% POR CANAL                  ║'\); console.log\('╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\\n'\); json.data.cards.forEach\(c => { const cmvFormatado = c.cmv.valor.toLocaleString\('pt-BR', {minimumFractionDigits: 2}\); console.log\(\\`  \\${c.canal.padEnd\(12\)} | CMV%: \\${c.cmv.percentual.toFixed\(2\)}% | R\\$ \\${cmvFormatado}\\`\); }\); const cmvTotal = json.data.totais.cmv.valor.toLocaleString\('pt-BR', {minimumFractionDigits: 2}\); console.log\(\\`\\n  TOTAL CMV       | CMV%: \\${json.data.totais.cmv.percentual.toFixed\(2\)}% | R\\$ \\${cmvTotal}\\n\\`\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0, 'utf-8'\); const json = JSON.parse\(data\); console.log\('\\n╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗'\); console.log\('║     TESTE: Formatação com toLocaleString pt-BR             ║'\); console.log\('╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\\n'\); json.data.cards.forEach\(c => { const cmv = c.cmv.valor.toLocaleString\('pt-BR', {minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2}\); const receita = c.receitaBruta.toLocaleString\('pt-BR', {minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2}\); console.log\(\\`  \\${c.canal.padEnd\(12\)} | R\\$ \\${receita.padStart\(15\)} | CMV%: \\${c.cmv.percentual.toFixed\(2\)}%\\`\); }\); const cmvTotal = json.data.totais.cmv.valor.toLocaleString\('pt-BR', {minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2}\); const receitaTotal = json.data.totais.receitaBruta.toLocaleString\('pt-BR', {minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2}\); console.log\(\\`\\n  TOTAL\\${' '.repeat\(8\)} | R\\$ \\${receitaTotal.padStart\(15\)} | CMV%: \\${json.data.totais.cmv.percentual.toFixed\(2\)}%\\n\\`\);")
